summary: Iteration 207 testing complete. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Orbital Hub with WebGL gravity field verified. New gravity nodes API (12 seeded nodes with rich spiritual/scientific data) working correctly. Abyss UX with Fibonacci spiral dormant satellites working via touch events. ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE opens on short tap. Weather ribbon displays correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 207 adds Einstein Spatial Curvature gravity field system. (1) Backend: GET /api/gravity/nodes returns 12 seeded nodes with frequency, gravity_mass, origin_language, star_coordinate, trinity (origin, synthesis, frequency_hz), unlocked status based on user tier. GET /api/gravity/field returns field parameters (resolution=80, damping_base=20, mass_scale=0.5) and nodes summary. POST /api/gravity/interact accumulates dwell_seconds and interaction_count, auto-progresses mastery tiers. (2) Frontend: /hub shows WebGL gravity field (data-testid='gravity-field' with canvas), central orb, weather ribbon, active satellites with gravity-responsive physics. Long-press (500ms) opens Abyss with Fibonacci spiral dormant satellites. Touch events work for long-press; mouse events may not trigger correctly. Click on dormant activates it. Short tap opens ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE. Double-tap triggers Zen Reset. (3) Key data-testids: orbital-hub-page, gravity-field, central-orb, weather-ribbon, satellite-{id}, dormant-{id}, abyss-backdrop. (4) Gravity node categories: vedic, hermetic, egyptian, hopi, sacred_geometry, star_chart, frequency.
